criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-compact-clear-guardrail --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-compact-clear-guardrail --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria qa-compact-clear-guardrail --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.

acceptance_criteria: Without permission and handoff, manager-permission --require-handoff --require fails closed.
After durable handoff and explicit worker_compact_clear permission, manager-permission --require-handoff --require passes.
request-worker-compact --strict-decisions --dry-run succeeds only with a valid nudge decision and records an audited command.
Replay, export, commands, and mutation-audit explain the permission, handoff, decision, compact request, and cleanup sequence.
guidelines: No meaningful project edits, commits, PRs, merges, destructive cleanup, or manual /compact /clear outside workerctl.
Prove fail-closed behavior before permission/handoff and prove allowed dry-run behavior after permission/handoff.
Use dry-run for compact/clear so this QA validates guardrails without changing worker context.
manager_config.objective: Validate compact/clear guardrails. The manager may request worker compact/clear only through workerctl, only after a durable handoff, explicit worker_compact_clear permission, and a fresh nudge decision.
